module:
Extensions for CommitTag model to integrate with the tagging system.

This module adds methods to the CommitTag model for automated tag extraction
using the new tagging system based on the Unified Registry pattern.

CommitTagExtension.docstring:
Extension methods for the CommitTag model.
    
    These methods can be mixed into the existing CommitTag model
    to add functionality that leverages the new tagging system.

extract_tags_for_commit.docstring:
Extract tags for a commit using the tagging service.
        
        Args:
            commit: Commit model instance
            max_tags: Maximum number of tags to extract
            min_confidence: Minimum confidence threshold for tags
            
        Returns:
            List of created CommitTag instances

apply_commit_tag_extensions.docstring: Apply extension methods to the CommitTag model.
